creative_brief: Split-screen showing a product label with farm details alongside the actual farm/farmer, emphasizing the direct connection.
primary_text: You deserve to know exactly what you're buying. Our beef comes from Rachel's Farm in Kempsey NSW, 100% grass-fed with no hormones. Our salmon is wild-caught by Collins on the South Coast. Every product shows the farm, the farmer, and the story. Collect from your nearest hub when it suits you.
headline: Know your farmer, know your food
description: Farm-direct groceries with full transparency. See exactly where every product comes from. Collect from local hubs.
